face_description: Describe yourself the way you'd describe a stranger at a party. Include age range, ethnicity, face shape, hair colour and style, glasses, facial hair, distinctive features. Specific beats generic. Examples: 'young asian man, round youthful face, dark bowl-cut hair, round black wire-frame glasses, clean-shaven, early twenties' OR 'middle-aged white man, short brown beard, short brown hair, dark brown eyes, mid-thirties'.
channel_description: Optional: 1 sentence about what your channel covers. Used as a hint for whiteboard content.
